name: Edward.Newgate - ST15-002 (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.[Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 5000 power or less.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
